violations.description: INSECT RODENT ANIMAL CONTROL (3 pts): Door in the food prep area noted open and not screened.
THAWING POTENTIALLY HAZARDOUS FOOD (2 pts): Potentially hazardous foods (Chicken) noted not being thawed using approved methods. Chicken noted thawing by leaving out on counter.
DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): The three compartment sink was noted not being properly operated.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Reachin cooler interiors and exteriors reachin cooler door gaskets portable fan and other equipment exteriors noted not clean
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors and walls in the food prep areas noted in need of cleaning under and around in place equipment.
TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): Toilet room door noted not self closing.
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): A hand drying device was noted not provided at the hand washing lavatory in the food prep area. Towels out and where replaced.
POISONS/TOXIC MATERIALS AND MEDICINE (3 pts): Chemical bottles noted not labeled in food prep area. Corrected on the spot by adding labels.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Reachin cooler door gaskets noted not in good repair and ripping.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Reachin cooler interiors and exteriors reachin cooler door gaskets and other equipment exteriors noted not clean
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors and walls in the food prep areas noted in need of cleaning under and around in place equipment.
EMPLOYEE PRACTICES (1 pts): A personal beverage was observed in an improper container - no lid on cup.
